features.name: static cast to typedef of packed array
features.description: Code should include a static cast using a type alias that resolves to a packed array type

features.name: static cast from interface packed array member to packed struct
features.description: Code should include a static cast from an interface signal member (packed array) to a packed struct type

features.name: static cast to two-dimensional packed array type
features.description: Code should include a static cast to a two-dimensional packed array type where dimensions are specified as [n][m]

features.name: static cast between interface packed array types
features.description: Code should include a static cast from one interface packed array type to a different packed struct type
